title: Coganja
compiled_truth: Coganja is an external contact at [AOL](companies/aol). Over the corpus period (2000-12-12 to 2001-12-07), Coganja sent 9 and received 41 emails, totalling 50 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sbreen](people/sbreen-czn) (4), [Tstaab](people/tstaab) (3), [Theresa Staab](people/theresa-staab) (2), [Cwlipke](people/cwlipke-czn) (2), [Cfoster](people/cfoster) (2).
timeline:
